name: roi-toolkit
description: Defendable per-feature ROI for Patient Engagement (PE) roadmaps. 4 skills covering the full lifecycle: build new features, adjust existing assumptions with cascade enforcement, deep-review with CFO + Head of Product personas, and maintain master rollup + Phase Plan. Driver-based bottom-up modeling, 3-scenario forecasting, web-research-validated CFs with TH discount, anti-confirmation-bias whitelist for auto-fixes. Optimized to ~37% lower token cost vs single-skill v1 while preserving 71% bug-catch rate.
